parameters.query:
SELECT 
  project.number,
  project.id as project_id,
  project.labels.tenant as tenant,
  SUM(cost) as total_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN usage.unit = 'byte-seconds' THEN usage.amount ELSE 0 END) as storage_bytes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN usage.unit = 'seconds' THEN usage.amount ELSE 0 END) as compute_seconds
FROM `devsecops-research.billing.gcp_billing_export_v1_XXXXXX`
WHERE invoice.month = FORMAT_DATE('%Y%m', DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY))
GROUP BY project.number, project.id, project.labels.tenant
HAVING project.labels.tenant IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  labels.tenant,
  AVG(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total) as avg_cpu_seconds,
  AVG(container_memory_working_set_bytes) as avg_memory_bytes,
  SUM(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total) as total_cpu_seconds
FROM `devsecops-research.gke_cluster.resource_usage`
WHERE timestamp >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY labels.tenant

SELECT 
  tenant,
  SUM(query_count) as total_queries
FROM `research.db_usage`
WHERE timestamp >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
GROUP BY tenant
